title: TheBr0kEn
description: exploer surval  horror find the way out of the world hes watching Out for early access
body:
You were not supposed to be here.

The Broken is a psychological survival horror mod that reshapes Minecraft into an unsettling exploration experience. The world feels fractured and hostile, where silence is oppressive and the environment subtly reacts to your presence. Fear is built through atmosphere, not jumpscares.

Explore abandoned terrain, uncover fragmented lore, and survive a world that feels aware of you.

Early Access Notice

This mod is in active development. Bugs, unfinished features, and breaking updates are expected. World compatibility is not guaranteed between versions.

Features

Dark, broken atmosphere focused on psychological horror

Custom blocks and environmental details

Ambient sound events and visual unease

Hidden lore scattered throughout the world

Experimental mechanics (Early Access)
![OUT FOR EARLY ACCESS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fe6b1cd09b31b24a91ad2f7a50fc34e9a24eb7a.png)
